column2:
Apply following effects based on iteration on cast
1. if iteration exists: { colorful buckshot count } increases by iteration - 1
2. if iteration doesn't exist: set sum of all { colorful buckshot count } in this cast to 0
after that, if { colorful buckshot count } > 0: cast colorful buckshot colorful buckshot count times
damage of colorful buckshot cast this way increases by ( sum of all { colorful buckshot count } in this cast ^ math.max( 1, number of NG+ ) )
lifetime increases by ( 20% × ( sum of all { colorful buckshot count } in this cast - 1 ) )
fire rate wait increased by ( 3 × { colorful buckshot count } ) frames
spread degrees increases by ( 5 × { colorful buckshot count } ^ 2 )
column10:
根据释放时的 迭代数 把以下效果适用
1. 有 迭代数: { 幻彩霰弹计数 } 增加 ( 迭代数 - 1 )
2. 没有 迭代数: 本次施法当前 { 幻彩霰弹计数 } 之和变成 0
那之后，如果 { 幻彩霰弹计数 } > 0: 释放 { 幻彩霰弹计数 } 个幻彩霰弹
这个方法释放的幻彩霰弹伤害增加 ( 本次施法全部 { 幻彩霰弹计数 } 之和 ^ math.max( 1, NG+数 ) )
存在时间延长 ( 20% × ( 本次施法全部 { 幻彩霰弹计数 } 之和 - 1 ) )
释放延迟增加 ( 3 × { 幻彩霰弹计数 } ) 帧
散射角度增加 ( 5 × { 幻彩霰弹计数 } ^ 2 )
幻彩递归迭代投射物: 链锯

column2:
Apply following effects based on recursion level and iteration on cast
1. if recursion exists: fire rate wait set to 0, { colorful chainsaw count } increases by 3 × ( 1 + recursive level )
2. if iteration exists: reload time set to 0, { colorful chainsaw count } increases by iteration
3. if 1. and 2. both exist: mana set to half
4. if 1. and 2. both don't exist: mana set to half, set sum of all { colorful chainsaw count }s in this cast to 0
after that, if { colorful chainsaw count } > 0: cast Colorful chainsaw 1 times
damage of Colorful chainsaw cast this way increases by SCALE * ( sum of all { colorful chainsaw count } in this cast ^ ( 1 + number of NG+ ) )
specifically, default value of SCALE is 25, some other mods may change this value
column10:
根据释放时的 递归等级 与 迭代数 把以下效果适用
1. 有 递归等级: 施法延迟 变成 0，{ 幻彩链锯计数 } 增加 3 × ( 1 + 递归等级 )
2. 有 迭代数: 充能时间 变成 0，{ 幻彩链锯计数 } 增加 迭代数
3. 同时满足 1. 与 2.: 法力变成一半
4. 同时不满足 1. 与 2.: 法力变成一半, 本次施法当前 { 幻彩链锯计数 } 之和变成 0
那之后，如果 { 幻彩链锯计数 } > 0: 释放 1 个幻彩链锯
这个方法释放的幻彩链锯伤害增加 ( 缩放比例 * 本次施法全部 { 幻彩链锯计数 } 之和 ^ ( 1 + NG+数 ) )
特别地, 缩放比例 默认值为 25, 部分其他模组可能更改此数值
幻彩递归迭代投射物: 洞

column2:
Apply following effects based on recursion level and iteration on cast
1. if recursion exists: fire rate wait +60 frames
2. if iteration exists: reload time +60 frames
3. recursion 0: target spell becomes [ Black Hole ]
4. recursion 1: target spell becomes Giga [ Black Hole ]
5. recursion 2: target spell becomes Omega [ Black Hole ]
6. if 1. and 2. both exist: replace target spell in 3., 4. and 5. with corresponding [ White Hole ] ver.
7. if 1. doesn't exists and 2. exists: target spell becomes Energy Orb
8. if 1. and 2. both don't exist: target spell becomes Energy Sphere, send all spells from hand and deck to graveyard, ban draw
after that, cast target spell 1 times
column10:
根据释放时的 递归等级 与 迭代数 把以下效果适用
1. 有 递归等级: 施法延迟 +60 帧
2. 有 迭代数: 充能时间 +60 帧
3. 递归 0: 目标法术 变为 [ 黑洞 ]
4. 递归 1: 目标法术 变为 巨大[ 黑洞 ]
5. 递归 2: 目标法术 变为 终结[ 黑洞 ]
6. 同时满足 1. 与 2.: 将 3., 4. 与 5. 中的 目标法术 替换为对应的 [ 白洞 ] 版本
7. 不满足 1. 但满足 2.: 目标法术 变为 能量球
8. 同时不满足 1. 与 2.: 目标法术 变为 能量球体, 将整个手卡·卡组送去墓地, 开启禁抽
那之后, 释放 1 发 目标法术

column2:
Apply following effects based on recursion level on cast
1. if recursion exists: lifetime of spells +120 frames, fire rate wait +40 frames, reload time -20 frames
2. recursion 0: projectile can through enemies
3. recursion 1: projectiles won't slowed by air or liquid, can pass through ground without slowing down and ignore impact of gravity
4. recursion 2+: projectile accelerate towards your foes
5. if recursion doesn't exist: clear current extra entities, then set projectile lifetime to 0, fire rate wait -20 frames, reload time +40 frames
column10:
根据释放时的 递归等级 把以下效果适用
1. 有 递归等级: 投射物存在时间延长 120 帧, 施法延迟 +40 帧, 充能时间 -20 帧
2. 递归 0: 投射物能够穿透敌人
3. 递归 1: 投射物不会被空气以及液体减速, 不减速地穿透地形且不受重力影响
4. 递归 2+: 投射物向你的敌人加速扑去
5. 无 递归等级: 清空当前 额外实体, 然后投射物的存在时间变为 0, 施法延迟 -20 帧, 充能时间 +40 帧

column2:
Initial iteration: 1; Iteration limit: 5
remember <iteration count>th spell from front of deck
cast remembered spell 2 times with no draw, but reduce its damage
iteration count of spells cast this way +1
if this spell's iteration count exceeds its iteration limit: change to 'Divide by 1'
if this is last 'divide by (+/-)': return <iteration count> as <recursive count>
if this is iteration 1: send <recursive count> spells from front of deck to graveyard, after that, draw 1
specifically, if spell cast is 'Colorful' series: recursion level treat as nil
column10:
初始迭代: 1; 迭代极限: 5
记住卡组前面第 <迭代数> 个法术
禁抽地释放记住的法术 2 次，但降低其伤害
这个方法释放的法术 <迭代数> +1
如果此法术的迭代数超出其迭代极限: 变为 '一分为一+'
如果这是最后1个 '一分(+/-)' : 将 <迭代数> 作为 <递归数> 回传
如果这是迭代1: 从卡组前面把 <递归数> 个法术送去墓地, 那之后, 抽 1
特别地, 释放 '幻彩' 系列法术时: 递归等级 当作 nil 处理

column2:
Initial iteration: 1; Iteration limit: 4
remember <iteration count>th spell from front of deck
cast remembered spell 3 times with no draw, but reduce its damage
iteration count of spells cast this way +1
if this spell's iteration count exceeds its iteration limit: change to 'Divide by 1'

column2:
Syntax:
1. <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> a + <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> b
return value of a + b
if 1 of them is <NUMBER[ ]>: add each <NUMBER> in it to other value
2. ( at start of para expr.: ) + <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> num
CAUTION: a and b in 1. can't both be <NUMBER[ ]>
when cast directly: fire rate wait and reload time set to ( fire + reload )
column10:
语法:
1. <数值|数值[ ]> a + <数值|数值[ ]> b
返回 a + b 的值
如果其中 1 项是 <数值[ ]>: 将其中的每个 <数值> 与另一个值相加
2. ( 在参数表达式的开头 ) + <数值|数值[ ]> num
警告: 1. 中的 a 与 b 不能都是 <数值[ ]>

直接释放时: 释放延迟与充能时间变为 ( 延迟 + 充能 )

column2:
Syntax:
1. <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> a - <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> b
return value of a - b
if a is <NUMBER[ ]>: subtract b from each <NUMBER> in a
if b is <NUMBER[ ]>: subtract each <NUMBER> in b from a
2. ( at start of para expr.: ) - <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> num
CAUTION: a and b in 1. can't both be <NUMBER[ ]>
when cast directly: fire rate wait and reload time set to other minus self
column10:
语法:
1. <数值|数值[ ]> a - <数值|数值[ ]> b
返回 a - b 的值
如果其中 1 项是 <数值[ ]>: 将其中的每个 <数值> 与另一个值相减
2. ( 在参数表达式的开头 ) - <数值|数值[ ]> num
警告: 1. 中的 a 与 b 不能都是 <数值[ ]>

直接释放时: 释放延迟与充能时间变为另一个减去自身的值

column2:
Syntax:
<NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> a × <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> b
return value of a × b
if 1 of them is <NUMBER[ ]>: multiply each <NUMBER> in it by other value
CAUTION: a and b can't both be <NUMBER[ ]>
when cast directly: fire rate wait and reload time set to ( fire × reload )
column10:
语法:
<数值|数值[ ]> a × <数值|数值[ ]> b
返回 a × b 的值
如果其中 1 项是 <数值[ ]>: 将其中的每个 <数值> 与另一个值相乘
警告: a 与 b 不能都是 <数值[ ]>

直接释放时: 释放延迟与充能时间变为 ( 延迟 × 充能 )

column2:
Syntax:
<NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> a / <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> b
return value of a / b
if a is <NUMBER[ ]>: divide each <NUMBER> in a by b
if b is <NUMBER[ ]>: divide a by each <NUMBER> in b
CAUTION: a and b can't both be <NUMBER[ ]>
when cast directly: fire rate wait and reload time set to other divide by self - use as 1 when self is 0
column10:
语法:
<数值|数值[ ]> a / <数值|数值[ ]> b
返回 a / b 的值
如果其中 1 项是 <数值[ ]>: 将其中的每个 <数值> 与另一个值相除
警告: a 与 b 不能都是 <数值[ ]>

直接释放时: 释放延迟与充能时间变为另一个除以自身的值, 向上取整 - 分母为 0 时，在计算时分母当作 1 使用

column2:

extract first value of extract_table, return it as <NUMBER>
2. get_first( <NUMBER[ ]> extract_table, <NUMBER> index )
extract value at index No. from start of extract_table, return it as <NUMBER>
column10:
语法:
1. get_first( <数值[ ]> 提取数组 )
从 提取数组 中提取顺数第 1 项, 并将其作为 <数值> 返回
2. get_first( <数值[ ]> 提取数组, <数值> N )
从 提取数组 中提取顺数第 N 项, 并将其作为 <数值> 返回

extract last value of extract_table, return it as <NUMBER>

extract value at index No. from end of extract_table, return it as <NUMBER>
column10:
语法:
1. get_last( <数值[ ]> 提取数组 )
从 提取数组 中提取倒数第 1 项, 并将其作为 <数值> 返回
2. get_last( <数值[ ]> 提取数组, <数值> N )
从 提取数组 中提取倒数第 N 项, 并将其作为 <数值> 返回

column2: Syntax:\nvariable_get( <NUMBER> variable_No )\nget value of variable_No, return it as <NUMBER>
column10: 语法:\nvariable_get( <数值> 变量编号 )\n获得 变量编号 的值, 将获得的值作为 <数值> 返回

column2: Syntax:\nvariable_set( <NUMBER> variable_No, <NUMBER> set_value )\nset variable variable_No to set_value, return set_value as <NUMBER>
column10: 语法:\nvariable_set( <数值> 变量编号, <数值> 设置值 )\n将变量 变量编号 的值设为 设置值, 将 设置值 作为 <数值> 返回

column2:
Syntax:\lifetime_set( <NUMBER> duration )
mana reduce by duration ( mana may be negative ), set lifetime property of Lifetime Component in projectile to duration, return duration as <NUMBER>
after that, if command executed successfully and this spell cast due to drawing: draw 1
specifically: trying to set value of para to -1 will reduce 500 mana and remove lifetime component, instead of increasing 1 mana
column10:
语法: 
lifetime_set( <数值> 持续时间 )
扣减等同于 持续时间 的法力 ( 法力可能扣成负数 ), 将投射物中 lifetime 组件的属性设为 持续时间, 将 持续时间 作为 <数值> 返回
那之后, 如果命令成功执行且此法术因抽卡而释放: 抽 1
特别地: 尝试向参数输入 -1 将扣减 500 法力且移除 lifetime 组件, 而不是恢复 1 法力

column2:
Syntax:
projectile_lifetime_set( <NUMBER> duration )
mana reduce by duration ( mana may be negative ), set lifetime property of Projectile Component in projectile to duration, return duration as <NUMBER>
after that, if command executed successfully and this spell cast due to drawing: draw 1
specifically: trying to set value of para to -1 will reduce 300 mana, instead of increasing 1 mana
column10:
语法: 
projectile_lifetime_set( <数值> 持续时间 )
扣减等同于 持续时间 的法力 ( 法力可能扣成负数 ), 将投射物中 投射物 组件的 lifetime 属性设为 持续时间, 将 持续时间 作为 <数值> 返回
那之后, 如果命令成功执行且此法术因抽卡而释放: 抽 1
特别地: 尝试向参数输入 -1 将扣减 300 法力, 而不是恢复 1 法力

column2:
Syntax:
1. projectile_speed_set( <NUMBER> speed_value )
set speed of Projectile Component in projectile to speed_value while preserving its direction, return speed_value as <NUMBER>
2. projectile_speed_set( <NUMBER> vel_x, <NUMBER> vel_y )
set velocity_x of Velocity Component in projectile to vel_x, set velocity_y to vel_y, return { vel_x, vel_y } as <NUMBER[ ]>
after that, if command executed successfully and this spell cast due to drawing: draw 1
specifically, remove speed cap of projectiles modified by this command
column10:
语法: 
1. projectile_speed_set( <数值> 速率 )
在保持投射物速度方向的状态下, 将投射物中 投射物 组件的 速度 属性设为 速率, 将 速率 作为 <数值> 返回
2. projectile_speed_set( <数值> 水平速度, <数值> 垂直速度 )
将投射物中 速度 组件的 vel_x 属性设为 水平速度, vel_y 属性设为 垂直速度, 将 { 水平速度, 垂直速度 } 作为 <数值[ ]> 返回
那之后, 如果命令成功执行且此法术因抽卡而释放: 抽 1
特别地, 被此命令修饰的投射物移除速度上限

column2:
Syntax:
1. projectile_gravity_set( <NUMBER> gravity_y )
set gravity_y of Velocity Component in projectile to gravity_y, return gravity_y as <NUMBER>
2. projectile_gravity_set( <NUMBER> gravity_y, <NUMBER> gravity_x )
set gravity_y of Velocity Component in projectile to gravity_y, set gravity_x to gravity_x, return { gravity_y, gravity_x } as <NUMBER[ ]>
after that, if command executed successfully and this spell cast due to drawing: draw 1
column10:
语法:

2. projectile_gravity_set( <数值> 垂直重力, <数值> 水平重力 )
将投射物中 速度 组件的 gravity_y 属性设为 垂直重力, gravity_x 属性设为 水平重力, 将 { 垂直重力, 水平重力 } 作为 <数值[ ]> 返回
那之后, 如果命令成功执行且此法术因抽卡而释放: 抽 1

column2:
Syntax:
1. projectile_arc_add( <NUMBER> angle )
Rotate projectile's velocity direction counterclockwise by angle° per frame from its original orientation, return angle as <NUMBER>
2. projectile_arc_add( <NUMBER> angle, <NUMBER> inc )
Each frame: { arc add count } +1, then rotate projectile's velocity direction counterclockwise by ( angle + { arc add count } * inc )° from its original orientation, return { angle, inc } as <NUMBER[ ]>
3. projectile_arc_add( <NUMBER> delay_angle, <NUMBER> delay_inc, <NUMBER> delay )
After delay frames, remove effects of 1. and 2., after that, each frame:
{ delay arc add count } +1, then rotate projectile's velocity direction counterclockwise by ( delay_angle + { delay arc add count } * delay_inc )° from its original orientation
Return { delay_angle, delay_inc, delay } as <NUMBER[ ]>
4. projectile_arc_add( <NUMBER> delay_angle, <NUMBER> delay_inc, <NUMBER> delay, <NUMBER> duration )
After delay frames, remove effects of 1. and 2., after that, each frame ( lasting for duration frames in total ):
{ delay arc add count } +1, then rotate projectile's velocity direction counterclockwise by ( delay_angle + { delay arc add count } * delay_inc )° from its original orientation
Return { delay_angle, delay_inc, delay, duration } as <NUMBER[ ]>
after that, if command executed successfully and this spell cast due to drawing: draw 1
Specifically, { arc add count } and { delay arc add count } both start at 0, and count per projectile independently
column10:
语法:
1. projectile_arc_add( <数值> 角度 )
将投射物的速度方向在原基础上每帧逆时针偏转 角度°, 将 角度 作为 <数值> 返回
2. projectile_arc_add( <数值> 角度, <数值> 增长 )
每 1 帧: { 弧增计数 } +1, 然后将投射物的速度方向在原基础上逆时针偏转 ( 角度 + { 弧增计数 } * 增长 )°, 将 { 角度, 增长 } 作为 <数值[ ]> 返回
3. projectile_arc_add( <数值> 延迟角度, <数值> 延迟增长, <数值> 延迟 )
在经过 延迟 帧后, 移除 1. 与 2. 的影响; 那之后, 每 1 帧:
{ 延迟弧增计数 } +1, 然后将投射物的速度方向在原基础上逆时针偏转 ( 延迟角度 + { 延迟弧增计数 } * 延迟增长 )°
将 { 延迟角度, 延迟增长, 延迟 } 作为 <数值[ ]> 返回
4. projectile_arc_add( <数值> 延迟角度, <数值> 延迟增长, <数值> 延迟, <数值> 持续时间 )
在经过 延迟 帧后, 移除 1. 与 2. 的影响; 那之后, 每 1 帧 ( 共持续 持续时间 帧 ):
{ 延迟弧增计数 } +1, 然后将投射物的速度方向在原基础上逆时针偏转 ( 延迟角度 + { 延迟弧增计数 } * 延迟增长 )°
将 { 延迟角度, 延迟增长, 延迟, 持续时间 } 作为 <数值[ ]> 返回
那之后, 如果命令成功执行且此法术因抽卡而释放: 抽 1
特别地, { 弧增计数 } 与 { 延迟弧增计数 } 初始值均为 0, 且对每个投射物分别计数

column2:
Syntax:
1. explode( <NUMBER> r, <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> target )
creates an explosion at where target is with explosion radius = r, return r as <NUMBER>
2. explode( <NUMBER> r, <NUMBER> x, <NUMBER> y )
Creates an explosion at specified position with explosion radius = r, return r as <NUMBER>
CAUTION: you can't set damage separately - it always equals r
column10:
语法:
1. explode( <数值> r, <数值|数值[ ]> 目标 )
在所有 目标 位置创建 半径 = r 的爆炸, 将 r 作为 <数值> 返回
2. explode( <数值> r, <数值> 目标x, <数值> 目标y )
在 x = 目标x, y = 目标y 处创建 半径 = r 的爆炸, 将 r 作为 <数值> 返回
警告: 你不能单独设置爆炸伤害 - 它总是等于 r

column2:
Syntax:
1. tp( <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> teleport_entity_ids, <NUMBER> target_entity_id )
teleport all entities within teleport_entity_ids to location where target_entity_id is, return count of teleported entities as <NUMBER>
2. tp( <NUMBER|NUMBER[ ]> teleport_entity_ids, <NUMBER> target_x, <NUMBER> target_y )
teleport all entities within teleport_entity_ids to x = target_x, y = target_y, return count of teleported entities as <NUMBER>
column10:
语法:
1. tp( <数值|数值[ ]> 传送实体, <数值> 目标实体 )
将 传送实体 内所有实体传送至 目标实体 处, 将传送实体数量作为 <数值> 返回
2. tp( <数值|数值[ ]> 传送实体, <数值> 目标x, <数值> 目标y )
将 传送实体 内所有实体传送至 x = 目标x, y = 目标y 处, 将传送实体数量作为 <数值> 返回

column2:
Repeat following effects in order until no spell in hand or { ×2 count } >= ( 2 × total number of spells in this wand ):
1. cast first spell in hand with no draw, { ×2 count } +1
but if first spell in hand is [ ! ? ×2 ? ! ] or [ RESET ]: skip entire 1.
2. send first spell in hand to graveyard
ignore impact of spells cast in 1. on mana, fire rate wait and reload time
specifically, initial value of { ×2 count } is 0
column10:
直到手卡没有法术存在或 { ×2计数 } >= ( 2 × 法杖内法术总数 ) 为止, 以下效果依次重复适用:
1. 禁抽地释放手卡第 1 个法术, { ×2计数 } +1
如果手卡第 1 个法术是 [ ! ? ×2 ? ! ] 或 [ 魔杖刷新 ]: 改为跳过整个 1.
2. 将手卡第 1 个法术送去墓地
无视 1. 中释放的法术对法力、施法延迟、充能时间的影响
特别地, { ×2计数 } 初始值为 0

column2:
Repeat following effects in order until no spell in deck or { ARRIVAL count } >= ( 2 × total number of spells in this wand ):
1. cast first spell in deck with no draw, { ARRIVAL count } +1
but if first spell in deck is [ ! ? ARRIVAL ? ! ] or [ RESET ]: skip entire 1.
2. send first spell in deck to graveyard
ignore impact of spells cast in 1. on mana, fire rate wait and reload time
specifically, initial value of { ARRIVAL count } is 0
column10:
直到卡组没有法术存在或 { 到来计数 } >= ( 2 × 法杖内法术总数 ) 为止, 以下效果依次重复适用:
1. 禁抽地释放卡组第 1 个法术, { 到来计数 } +1
如果卡组第 1 个法术是 [ ! ? 到来 ? ! ] 或 [ 魔杖刷新 ]: 改为跳过整个 1.
2. 将卡组第 1 个法术送去墓地
无视 1. 中释放的法术对法力、施法延迟、充能时间的影响
特别地, { 到来计数 } 初始值为 0

column2:
Repeat following effects in order until no spell in graveyard or { DEPARTURE count } >= ( 2 × total number of spells in this wand ):
1. cast first spell in graveyard with no draw, { DEPARTURE count } +1
but if first spell in graveyard is [ ! ? DEPARTURE ? ! ] or [ RESET ]: skip entire 1.
2. return first spell in graveyard to deck
ignore impact of spells cast in 1. on mana, fire rate wait and reload time
specifically, initial value of { DEPARTURE count } is 0
column10:
直到墓地没有法术存在或 { 离去计数 } >= ( 2 × 法杖内法术总数 ) 为止, 以下效果依次重复适用:
1. 禁抽地释放墓地第 1 个法术, { 离去计数 } +1
如果墓地第 1 个法术是 [ ! ? 离去 ? ! ] 或 [ 魔杖刷新 ]: 改为跳过整个 1.
2. 将墓地第 1 个法术返回卡组
无视 1. 中释放的法术对法力、施法延迟、充能时间的影响
特别地, { 离去计数 } 初始值为 0

column2:
Repeat following effects in order until no spell in hand or { RETURN count } >= ( 2 × total number of spells in this wand ):
1. cast first spell in hand with no draw, { RETURN count } +1
but if first spell in hand is [ ! ? RETURN ? ! ] or [ RESET ]: skip entire 1.
2. if { RETURN count } is:
· odd: send first spell in hand to graveyard, { discard count } +1
· even: return first spell in hand to deck
ignore impact of spells cast in 1. on mana, fire rate wait and reload time
after that, if { discard count } > 0: return first { discard count } spells from graveyard to front of deck by preserving order
after that, if { RETURN count } > 0: draw { RETURN count }
specifically, initial value of { RETURN count } and { discard count } is 0
column10:
直到手卡没有法术存在或 { 归来计数 } >= ( 2 × 法杖内法术总数 ) 为止, 以下效果依次重复适用:
1. 禁抽地释放手卡第 1 个法术, { 归来计数 } +1
如果手卡第 1 个法术是 [ ! ? 归来 ? ! ] 或 [ 魔杖刷新 ]: 改为跳过整个 1.
2. 如果 { 归来计数 } 是:
· 奇数: 将手卡第 1 个法术送去墓地, { 弃牌计数 } +1
· 偶数: 将手卡第 1 个法术返回卡组
无视 1. 中释放的法术对法力、施法延迟、充能时间的影响
那之后, 如果 { 弃牌计数 } > 0: 将墓地前 { 弃牌计数 } 个法术保持顺序返回卡组前面
那之后, 如果 { 归来计数 } > 0: 抽 { 归来计数 }
特别地, { 归来计数 } 与 { 弃牌计数 } 初始值为 0
